case_title: NICOLE IRIBARREN VS. UNLV PEDIATRIC DENTISTRY-SCHOOL OF DENTAL MEDICINE

REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-21-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NICOLE IRIBARREN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT UNLV PEDIATRIC DENTISTRY - SCHOOL OF DENTAL MEDICINE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID KEENE VIA ZOOM. THE COURT WAIVES ANY PROCEDURAL IRREGULARITIES FOR TODAY. PARTIES ARE REMINDED ABOUT ZOOM REQUEST AND SC-109. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: KATHLEEN A. KELLY ; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

TTHE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF NICOLE IRIBARREN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNLV PEDIATRIC DENTISTRY-SCHOOL OF DENTAL MEDICINE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID KEENE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
